popularStory.headline: Clerke, Baron James  story
popularStory.description: James Clerke was born on December 9, 1485, in Wrotham, Kent, England. He was married four times and had eight sons and one daughter. He died on September 20, 1554, in his hometown at the age of 68.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Clarke於1485年12月9日出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦時，他的父親Sir John Forde Clarke III37歲，母親Lucia Moyle35歲。他於1500年與Elizabeth Ferrers在英國英格蘭奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1554年9月20日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Clarke于1485年12月9日出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦时，他的父亲Sir John Forde Clarke III37岁，母亲Lucia Moyle35岁。他于1500年与Elizabeth Ferrers在英国英格兰奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1554年9月20日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾姆 馬可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Clarke was born on 9 December 1485, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Forde Clarke III, was 37 and his mother, Lucia Moyle, was 35. He married Elizabeth Ferrers in 1500, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 20 September 1554, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Clarke est né le 9 décembre 1485, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Forde Clarke III, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lucia Moyle, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ferrers en 1500, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1554, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England: Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Clarke am 9. Dezember 1485 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Forde Clarke III 37 und seine Mutter Lucia Moyle 35. Er hat 1500 in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 20. September 1554 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Clarke è nato il il 9 dicembre 1485 nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Forde Clarke III, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lucia Moyle, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Ferrers nel 1500, nel North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 20 settembre 1554, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Clarkeが1485年12月9日にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムで生まれた時，父Sir John Forde Clarke IIIは37歳，母Lucia Moyleは35歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンでElizabeth Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1554年9月20日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ マルクルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Clarke(이)가 1485년 12월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Forde Clarke III(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia Moyle(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 Elizabeth Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1554년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Clarke nasceu em 9 de dezembro de 1485, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Forde Clarke III, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lucia Moyle, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ferrers em 1500, em North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Clarke родился 9 декабря 1485 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Forde Clarke III было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia Moyle, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ferrers в 1500 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 20 сентября 1554 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
